items.title: Beet juice lowers blood pressure in older adults in just 2 weeks
items.summary: Drinking nitrate-rich beetroot juice may do more than support heart health — it could actually reshape the bacteria living in the mouth in ways that help lower blood pressure in older adults. items.title: Scientists supercharge natural killer cells to fight aggressive cancers
items.summary: Scientists at McGill University have found a way to supercharge the immune system’s natural killer (NK) cells, helping them break through the defenses tumors use to stay alive. items.title: Scientists discover hidden liver switch that cuts harmful cholesterol
items.summary: Scientists at UT Southwestern have uncovered a surprising new “master switch” that helps control how much cholesterol the liver sends into the bloodstream. items.title: Poremećaji prehrane u srednjoj dobi: Problem koji se često zanemaruje
items.summary: IAKO se poremećaji prehrane najčešće povezuju s adolescenticama, nije rijetkost da se jave ili vrate kod žena srednje životne dobi.

items.title: Surprising research reveals why you shouldn't add bananas to your smoothies
items.summary: Researchers found that adding bananas to berry smoothies can dramatically reduce the body’s ability to absorb healthy flavanols. The surprising discovery shows that even simple food combinations can change how much nutrition your body actually gets.

items.title: Scientists say house cats could help unlock new cancer treatments for humans
items.summary: Scientists have cracked open the “black box” of feline cancer in a landmark study that genetically analyzed nearly 500 cat tumors from around the world. items.title: Zašto za kivi kažu da je najzdravije voće na svijetu?
items.summary: SITNO, ali iznimno moćno voće, prava je nutritivna bomba.

items.title: Scientists “recharge” damaged nerves to ease chronic pain
items.summary: For millions battling chronic nerve pain, even the softest touch can feel agonizing — but scientists may have uncovered a radically new way to stop it at the source. items.title: AI scans 400,000 Reddit posts and finds hidden Ozempic side effects
items.summary: By analyzing over 400,000 Reddit posts, researchers discovered that users of popular GLP-1 weight-loss drugs frequently discussed unexpected symptoms like menstrual irregularities, chills, and hot flashes. items.title: Scientists discover hidden driver of aging — Simple supplement reversed brain decline
items.summary: A newly identified brain protein may play a major role in how the body ages. Researchers discovered that declining levels of Menin in the hypothalamus triggered inflammation, memory problems, bone loss, and other aging-related changes in mice. items.title: TikTokom se širi novi beauty trend s mrkvom, liječnica upozorava da nije bezazlen
items.summary: PRETJERANA konzumacija mrkve postala je najnoviji TikTok trend u sklopu takozvanog "looksmaxxing" pokreta.

items.title: Scientists warn popular vitamin D supplement may have a “previously unknown” downside
items.summary: A surprising study suggests vitamin D2 supplements may reduce the body’s levels of vitamin D3 — the more effective form of vitamin D. items.title: Wegovy linked to rare “eye stroke” that can cause sudden blindness
items.summary: A new analysis is raising concerns about Wegovy, the blockbuster weight-loss drug, after researchers found it may carry the highest risk of a rare “eye stroke” that can cause sudden vision loss. items.title: New AI body map reveals obesity’s hidden attack on facial nerves
items.summary: Scientists have created an AI-powered system that can scan and map an entire mouse body in extraordinary detail — and it just uncovered a surprising new effect of obesity.
